Home

Your Trusted Plumbers in Salem

Dealing with a plumbing problem that requires a professional plumber? Plumbers 911 can help. Just call 1-833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) to connect with a highly skilled plumber today.

Salem might offer a peaceful retreat from the big city with its Southern Illinois location, but it doesn't keep the home and business owners there from occasionally experiencing plumbing issues. Plumbers 911 can help when you're facing a plumbing emergency. Just like I-57 cuts through Salem and keeps you connected to other parts of the state, we connect you to local plumbers from our skilled network. We can help you find a Salem plumber, whether you own a business along Broadway Street or a home near the Salem Reservoir.

Why Hire Our Salem Plumbers?

When your plumbing in Salem stops working, you need a professional to respond quickly. You want a Salem plumber you can trust, but you don't have time to do a full investigation to find out who has the right equipment, tools and experience to do the work safely. 

When minutes count, Plumbers 911 is there to help. We've already vetted the local plumbers in our network to ensure they meet our rigorous standards. Every plumber in our network is highly qualified. When you call us, we connect you to a plumber in Salem instantly. 

Prescreened, Highly Qualified Salem Plumbers

Our vetting process evaluates plumbers on multiple factors to ensure they do the job well. We choose local plumbers since they know the neighborhoods in Salem and feel a commitment to the people there. 

We check for thousands of hours of experience from our plumbers, and we require rigorous training to ensure our plumbers are up-to-date on the latest in the field.

We also verify that they're fully licensed, insured and bonded to keep you protected.

Our Salem Plumbing Services

Whenever you choose a plumber in Salem from our network, you know you're getting an experienced plumbing professional who's ready to tackle all types of repairs. Some of the plumbing services available include:

Emergency Services: Unexpected plumbing problems can catch you off guard and leave you wondering what to do. With a call to Plumbers 911, you can have an emergency plumber to your home quickly, even outside of business hours. 

Drain Cleaning: Clogs in your drains can build up slowly with regular use or occur suddenly when something big goes down the drain. No matter how they happen, clogs need to be cleared safely with the specialty drain cleaning tools that our plumbers have. The plumbers in our network can also clean drains for maintenance and prevention. 

Water Heater Repair: A common Salem plumbing issue is a malfunctioning water heater. It not only interrupts your hot showers, but water heater issues also make it difficult to clean and sanitize your home or business. Our Salem plumbers are prepared to work on both tank and tankless water heaters to restore your flow of hot water.

Garbage Disposal Installation and Repair: Garbage disposals can make cleanup easier when they work properly. If your garbage disposal stops working or makes strange noises, a licensed plumber can identify the problem and fix it. Our plumbers can also install new garbage disposals.

Kitchen and Bathroom Remodeling: When your kitchen or bathroom is due for an update, you often need plumbing repairs. Our plumbers can install new pipes, move plumbing or install faucets as part of the remodeling process.

This is a basic overview of the major plumbing services available. Below, we have a more complete list of the plumbing repairs our plumbers can perform.
